data.name: Miami Paradise 2
data.detailed_description:
Miami never sleeps—and neither do its secrets.

Miami Paradise 2 is the bold next chapter in the mature open-world RPG series, expanding every system, character, and experience into a deeper, darker, and more immersive neon-soaked world of luxury, crime, and desire.

Built from the ground up with a new upgraded rendering pipeline, Miami Paradise 2 delivers a visually richer, smoother, and more atmospheric Miami than ever before—where every nightclub glow, beachfront sunset, and shadowed alley feels alive.

🔥 All-New Visual & Technical Upgrades

  • Upgraded Rendering System
    Enhanced lighting, improved skin shaders, richer materials, and more realistic environments create a cinematic, next-gen look.

  • Optimized Occlusion System
    Smarter occlusion culling dramatically boosts performance while allowing denser interiors, crowded venues, and seamless transitions.

  • Improved Performance & Stability
    Designed for smoother framerates in large open areas and complex interior scenes.

💃 New Characters & HD Animation Scenes

  • Meet all-new female characters, each with unique personalities, backstories, and relationship paths.

  • Experience high-definition animation scenes with smoother motion, improved facial expression, and more natural interaction.

  • Every character features unlockable moments, narrative-driven encounters, and bespoke animations tied directly to player choices.

🔫 Expanded Gun Combat

  • New firearm mechanics with tighter aiming, better feedback, and improved enemy reactions.

  • Engage in high-risk confrontations across nightclubs, luxury mansions, abandoned locations, and city streets.

  • Combat integrates seamlessly with story progression—violence always has consequences.

🌴 A Living, Dangerous Paradise

  • Explore an expanded Miami inspired by real-world luxury, nightlife, and crime culture.

  • Navigate power plays involving real estate moguls, club owners, artists, influencers, and criminals.

  • Choices matter—alliances, betrayals, and romances shape how the city responds to you.

🎮 Key Features

  • Mature open-world RPG with narrative-driven progression

  • New rendering and occlusion technology

  • New female characters with HD animations

  • Improved gun combat systems

  • Rich dialogue, branching storylines, and adult themes

  • Designed for replayability and player freedom

Miami Paradise 2 isn’t just bigger—it’s sharper, darker, and more personal.
Every choice leaves a mark. Every night has a price.

Welcome back to paradise.

data.short_description: Miami Paradise 2 is the bold next chapter in the mature open-world RPG series, expanding every system, sexy character, and intimate experience into a deeper, darker, and more immersive neon-soaked world of luxury, crime, and desire. Collect clues and build relationships with various characters.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 1.8 Ghz equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce 1080 and higher ; ATI radeon RX and higher
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: integrated or higher
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.4 Ghz equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1080 equivalent or greater ; ATI radeon RX and higher
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: integrated or higher

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 15 Sequoia
  • 處理器: MC68030 or Higher
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce 1080 and higher ; ATI radeon RX and higher
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: integrated or higher
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 15 Sequoia
  • 處理器: MC68030 or Higher
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1080 equivalent or greater ; ATI radeon RX and higher
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: integrated or higher

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or higher
  • Processor: 1.8 Ghz equivalent or greater
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce 1080 and higher ; ATI radeon RX and higher
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
  • Sound Card: integrated or higher

  • Processor: 2.4 Ghz equivalent or greater

  • Storage: 8 GB available space
  • Sound Card: integrated or higher
